calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Johanna Calabria, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bonnie Wagner-Costco DBA Bonnie Wagner Court Reporting Service.
Plaintiff's Witness Bonnie Wagner-Costco was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Scampini, Mortara & Harris, a California entity and Haig Harris an individual as follows:
Damages $10,493.00
Prejudgment Interest $986.37
Costs $436.26, for a total of $11,915.63
Judgment signed in open court.
